summary: The user sought recommendations for a quality watercolor brush set after clearing out old supplies and attending an art fair on March 11, where they purchased an abstract painting. They expressed interest in learning about color mixing techniques and the artist's background, aiming to recreate the painting's colors in their own work.
facts: The user attended an art fair in downtown on March 11 and purchased a beautiful abstract painting. The user is looking to upgrade their art supplies, specifically a watercolor brush set. The user plans to check out the Winsor & Newton Cotman Watercolors Brush Set, which costs around $50-$70. The user spoke with the artist of the abstract painting, who mentioned it was inspired by a hot air balloon ride. The user is interested in mixing blues and greens to capture the feeling of the hot air balloon ride in their artwork. The user plans to start learning about glazing and color mixing techniques from The Art of Watercolor website. The user is interested in finding more information about the artist who created the abstract painting through social media or her website.
